subcodes.first_line: O my beloved! For some time no trace of thy pen hath appeared, nor any tidings from that divine enthusiast and captive of Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب من چندیست که اثر قلمی پدید نه و خبری از ان مفتون الهی و شیدای جمال
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
